 When I first took an interest in Wikipedia I scratched my head for subjects to take on. Seeing that one or two - Kevin Howarth, Simon Rumley, were not mentioned on Wikipedia I thought that I would have a go at tackling them. I could have contributed to many other pages - and have - but I wanted to be the initiator of a page that no one had tackled before. Not long afterwards Greg Day got in touch and mentioned that he had seen the pages. He said ``how would I like to be an associate of the company``  and - being a journalist and always looking for extra bits on the CV - I said why not.
